title: ferray-polynomial: fit doesn't support weights parameter
description:
Goal: 

Acceptance criteria:
- 

NumPy's polynomial fit(x, y, deg, w=weights) supports weighted least-squares fitting via a weight array. ferray-polynomial's Poly::fit takes x, y, deg but no weights. The fitting.rs least_squares_fit function has a weights parameter internally, but check whether it's plumbed through to the public API. Weighted fitting is important for heteroscedastic data and robust fitting.
